channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Sattahip / Far South venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in Sattahip / Far South, Pattaya.

item.title: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
item.description: KBA Pattaya kiteboarding + foiling school at Blue Lagoon Na Jomtien. Pattaya branch of Thailand's leading multi-location chain (also Samui, Phuket, Hua Hin, Phangan).

item.title: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
item.description: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

item.title: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
item.description: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.

item.title: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access. Asset World Corp operator.

item.title: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern design lifestyle brand. Na Jomtien beachfront.

item.title: Chee Chan Golf Resort
item.description: Premium destination golf resort in Na Jomtien / Sattahip with Buddha Mountain views, championship layout, and modern clubhouse facilities. ฿฿฿ green fees.

item.title: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
item.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

item.title: Clubloongchat Watersports
item.description: Beachside watersports school: kitesurfing, wingfoiling, windsurfing, sailing, SUP. Expert lessons + rentals.

item.title: Cartoon Network Amazone Waterpark (now Columbia Pictures Aquaverse)
item.description: World first themed waterpark. 18 slides across 3 zones. Polin Waterparks hardware. Rebranded 2022 to Sony Pictures IPs. 15km south of Pattaya.

item.title: Ramayana Water Park Pattaya
item.description: Largest water park in Thailand and Southeast Asia. 184,000 sqm. 26 slides / 34 lanes. 600m lazy river around natural hill. Double wave pool with 150m beach. TripAdvisor 2019 #1 Asia / #10 World.

item.title: SailBreeze Sailing School @ Ocean Marina Yacht Club
item.description: Thailand most experienced sailing school (20+ years). Based at Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia largest marina (450+ berths). IYT certification + yacht charters.

item.title: Tarzan Adventure Pattaya (Zipline)
item.description: Pattaya jungle zipline park. 25-platform full course + half + kids. Bridges, ladders, abseil, ropes. Near Golden Cliff Temple.

item.title: Nong Nooch Tropical Garden — Thai Cultural & Muay Thai Show
item.description: Southeast Asia largest botanical garden (600 acres). Daily 90-min cultural show: Thai dance + Muay Thai demo + sword fighting + elephant show.

item.title: Andaz Pattaya Jomtien Beach (Hyatt)
item.description: 5-star Hyatt Andaz boutique. 24-hour Technogym fitness + 3 pools (adult/beachfront/family) + Panpuri Spa with 6 rooms + Japanese onsen + Turkish + Finnish baths.

item.title: Mövenpick Siam Hotel Na Jomtien Pattaya
item.description: 5-star Swiss-hospitality (Accor). 24-hour 2nd-floor fitness with floor-to-ceiling windows. 262 rooms. Seafront + lagoon pools. Little Birds Kids Club.
